changes.description: Fixed sys.path bug in _graph_impact_section() — added sys.path.insert(0, str(root)) before importing ContextGraph so blast-radius works in automated review
Added _is_git_commit_command() and post_commit_graph() for PostCommit synchronous graph reindex
New test file with 5 tests for PostCommit graph reindex hook
Shell wrapper for PostToolUse hook — delegates to workflow_hooks.py post_commit_graph
Registered hook-post-commit-graph.sh in PostToolUse Bash hooks with 10s timeout
Added graph-status CLI subcommand — reports existence, node/relationship/file counts, and staleness
Added TestGraphStatus class with 5 tests for graph-status subcommand
